basic_details.job_title: Mizoram University Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Junior Research Fellow and Project Associate Posts
basic_details.short_information: The latest Mizoram University JRF and Project Associate Recruitment 2026 has been announced under DRDO Sponsored Research Project! Published on 02-07-2026, this recruitment drive offers 02 vacancies (01 JRF + 01 Project Associate) in the Department of Computer Engineering. Eligible candidates can apply for these positions. The last date to submit the application is 14th July 2026. Find all details about the Mizoram University DRDO Project vacancy 2026, including eligibility, fellowship, and application process here.

age_limit.age_details: Defence Research and Development Organisation (DRDO), Ministry of Defence, Govt. of India

post_wise_qualification.essential_qualification: M.E./M.Tech. in Computer Science & Engineering / IT / AI / Data Science / Cyber Security or equivalent with First Class. Preference to GATE/NET qualified and experience in AI, ML, Deep Learning, Computer Vision, Cyber Security, Python.

B.E./B.Tech. in Computer Science & Engineering / IT / ECE or equivalent with First Class. Preference to skills in Python/C++, AI, ML, Software Development, Web/Mobile App Development, Computer Vision.

qualification.details: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): M.E./M.Tech. in Computer Science & Engineering / IT / AI / Data Science / Cyber Security or equivalent with First Class. Preference to GATE/NET qualified and experience in AI, ML, Deep Learning, Computer Vision, Cyber Security, Python. | Project Associate (PA): B.E./B.Tech. in Computer Science & Engineering / IT / ECE or equivalent with First Class. Preference to skills in Python/C++, AI, ML, Software Development, Web/Mobile App Development, Computer Vision.

how_to_apply: Interested candidates may send their detailed CV along with Annexure-I (Application Form), self-attested copies of educational certificates, mark sheets, experience certificates, and GATE/NET certificate (if any) to [email protected] on or before 14.07.2026.
The subject of the email should be: "Application for the Post of JRF/Project Associate – DRDO Project"
Only shortlisted candidates will be called for interview. The date and mode of interview will be communicated via email.
important_instructions: The appointments are purely temporary and co-terminus with the project. Selected candidates shall have no claim for regular appointment at Mizoram University or DRDO. Performance will be reviewed monthly. Unsatisfactory performance may lead to immediate termination. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. Candidates must produce original documents at the time of interview/joining.

faq.question: Q1. What is Mizoram University JRF Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Mizoram University has invited applications for Junior Research Fellow (JRF) and Project Associate (PA) positions under a DRDO sponsored research project through DRDO Industry Academia Centre of Excellence (DIA-CoE). The project duration is 2 years.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for Mizoram University DRDO Project 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit applications for JRF and Project Associate positions is 14th July 2026. Applications must be sent via email to [email protected].

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available at Mizoram University DRDO Project?
faq.answer: There are 02 vacancies — 01 for Junior Research Fellow (JRF) and 01 for Project Associate (PA).

faq.question: Q4. What is the eligibility for Mizoram University JRF 2026?
faq.answer: For JRF: M.E./M.Tech in CSE/IT/AI/Data Science/Cyber Security or equivalent with First Class. GATE/NET qualified candidates with experience in AI, ML, Deep Learning, Computer Vision will be preferred. For PA: B.E./B.Tech in relevant branches with First Class and good programming skills.

faq.question: Q5. How to apply for Mizoram University JRF and Project Associate?
faq.answer: Candidates should send detailed CV along with filled Annexure-I and self-attested documents to [email protected] with the subject “Application for the Post of JRF/Project Associate – DRDO Project” before 14 July 2026.

faq.question: Q6. Is GATE qualification mandatory for JRF at Mizoram University?
faq.answer: No, GATE/NET is not mandatory but candidates having valid GATE/NET score and relevant research experience will be given preference.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary for JRF and Project Associate at Mizoram University?
faq.answer: JRF: ₹37,000 + 9% HRA per month, Project Associate: ₹27,500 + 9% HRA per month (for the first year)
